_note: The Gym manifest (WP25a): which grammar points act as selectable form categories, grouped into picker columns. 'point' must match the grammar point title exactly (resolved to ids at request time). 'usage' is the plain-language hover explanation; 'example' is a short illustration. 'nonstandard': forms hidden behind the 'include non-standard words' toggle.

entries.point: Simple present: करता हूँ, करती है, करते हैं
entries.label: Simple present

entries.point: Present continuous: रहा है, रही है, रहे हैं
entries.label: Present continuous

entries.point: The perfect tenses: चुका है, गया था
entries.label: Perfect tenses

entries.point: Let's and may I: the subjunctive
entries.label: Subjunctive

entries.point: The ergative ने: मैंने किताब पढ़ी
entries.label: Ergative ने

entries.point: The oblique case: कमरे में, लड़के को
entries.label: Oblique case
Postpositions
entries.usage: in / on / from / to — after the noun.

entries.label: Possession का/के/की
entries.example: राम का घर, राम की किताब

entries.label: Gender
entries.usage: Every noun is masculine or feminine.
